name: What proof do I need for my ladder fall workers comp claim?
description: Photos, medical reports, witnesses, ladder condition evidence.

mainEntity.name: What proof do I need for my ladder fall workers comp claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Photos, medical reports, witnesses, ladder condition evidence.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Medical records, incident report, photos of ladder/site, and witness statements** prove the claim.

Document fall height, ladder condition, what you were doing. OSHA rules on ladders strengthen cases if violated.[7]

- Doctor notes linking injury to fall.
- Employer maintenance logs.
- Expert opinions for defects.

Preserve evidence before cleanup. In Utah, show work worsened idiopathic aspects.[1]
